POI.info:
ANSWERS:
2. Oola, lab genius
3. I am not in charge
2. Necromancy and golemancy
3. We embody magic
If door is closed, follow dashed line to WP and wait for Ogre Wars Event

Trail.trailData: Data/LadyElyssa/Map Completion/Core/Rata Sum Snaff Memorial Lab.trl
Data/LadyElyssa/Map Completion/Core/Rata Sum Applied Development Lab.trl

POI.copy-message:
After HEART is complete Highpass Haven Waypoint
For Hero Point go to Lost Child's Sorrow Waypoint
Horncall Waypoint and follow Yellow Trail back to main trail

POI.copy: Were you able to get the Vista and POI on Laughing Gull Island? If not, go to [&BKgBAAA=] and follow dashed trail then return to [&BLABAAA=].
POI.copy-message: Were you able to get the Vista and POI on Laughing Gull Island? If not, go to Laughing Gull Waypoint and follow dashed trail then return to Whisperwill Waypoint

POI.info:
If Gate is Closed or the Taidha Covington Event is active
Follow Route 6 from Laughing Gull WP and come back later.

POI.copy-message: Fort Cadence Waypoint (if uncontested) or Mira Waypoint and head NW to POI
Anchorage Waypoint (If Uncontested) or Meddler's Waypoint (Dashed Line)
